title: gastrochilus pseudodistichus
intro: Gastrochilus pseudodistichus, commonly known as the Pseudodistichus Lip Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gastrochilus pseudodistichus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include a decoction made by boiling the roots in water, which is often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
